problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: If Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
